name: axoniq-framework-contribution
description: Tools for contributors to the Axon Framework project: comprehensive code reviews against AF5 standards, core coding patterns, framework infrastructure design guidelines, reference documentation authoring, and PR comment processing. Not intended for application developers using Axon Framework.

interface.shortDescription: Tools for contributing to the Axon Framework project.
interface.longDescription: A curated plugin for Axon Framework contributors: code reviews against AF5 standards, core coding patterns, framework infrastructure design guidelines, reference documentation authoring, and PR comment processing. Not intended for application developers using Axon Framework.
defaultPrompt: Review my Axon Framework changes against AF5 contributor standards.
Process the review comments on an Axon Framework pull request.
Add or update Axon Framework 5 reference documentation.
